hypothesis.statement: A single privacy-safe event contract across GA4, Yandex Metrica, and Amplitude will make the next 100-visit cohort diagnosable without changing the landing conversion mechanics.
changeSet: Add a provider-neutral event contract and schema
Emit semantic funnel events to all three providers
Use stable plan and deploy identifiers
Disable Amplitude Session Replay and mask form data for replay tooling
Add contract tests and rebuild the browser bundle
hypothesis.expectedMetric: Server and leaderboard conversion stay comparable while client analytics expose landing → plan → form → attempt → completion/failure.
